subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Refuge and my Shelter! In that haven the loving friends have arranged a gathering of fellowship, and through the sweet fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا ملجا و پناها در آن بندر یاران مهرپرور یک مجلس انس آراستند و بنفحات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for forgiveness
